scripts.build: npm run build:emulator && npm run build:disk && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:emulator: rm -rf public/emulator && mkdir -p public/emulator && cp submodules/apple2ts/dist/index.html public/emulator/ && cp -r submodules/apple2ts/dist/assets public/emulator/ && cp -r submodules/apple2ts/dist/worklet public/emulator/ && cp submodules/apple2ts/dist/dot.png public/emulator/ && cp submodules/apple2ts/dist/tj-*.png public/emulator/
scripts.build:disk: mkdir -p public/emulator/disks && cp src/disks/master.dsk public/emulator/disks/vc83basic.dsk && ac -as public/emulator/disks/vc83basic.dsk VC83BASIC < submodules/vc83basic/basic_apple2 && ac -bas public/emulator/disks/vc83basic.dsk HELLO < src/disks/HELLO.bas && dsk2woz public/emulator/disks/vc83basic.dsk public/emulator/disks/vc83basic.woz
